account_locked.suspended: This account has been locked. Contact support to regain access.
account_locked.temporary: Too many failed sign-in attempts. Please try again in a few minutes.

email.already_verified: This email address has already been verified.
email.verification_expired: This verification link has expired. Request a new one.
email.verification_invalid: This verification link is invalid. Request a new one.

email_verification.already_verified: This email address has already been verified.
email_verification.subject: Verify your {app} email address
email_verification.verification_expired: This verification link has expired. Request a new one.
email_verification.verification_invalid: This verification link is invalid. Request a new one.

login.account_locked: This account has been locked. Contact support to regain access.
login.account_locked_temporary: Too many failed sign-in attempts. Please try again in {minutes} minutes.
login.mfa_required: Multi-factor authentication is required to complete sign-in.
login.rate_limited: Too many requests. Please try again in {seconds} seconds.

auth.mfa_required: Multi-factor authentication is required to complete sign-in.

mfa.already_enabled: Two-factor authentication is already enabled for this admin account.
mfa.enrollment_required: Two-factor authentication is required before you can access the admin console.
mfa.enrollment_suspended: Two-factor authentication has been suspended for this account. Contact support to restore access.
mfa.invalid_code: The two-factor code is invalid. Please try again.
mfa.not_enabled: Two-factor authentication is not enabled for this admin account.
mfa.provisional_expired: The two-factor enrollment session has expired. Please start again.
mfa.rate_limited: Too many invalid two-factor attempts. Please try again in {minutes} minutes.

password.breached: This password appears in known data breaches and cannot be used. Please choose a different one.
password.invalid_token: This password-reset link is invalid or has expired. Contact support to recover access.
password.invalid_type: The password must be a string.
password.too_long: The password must not exceed {max} characters.
password.too_short: The password must be at least {min} characters.

reset.invalid_token: This password-reset link is invalid or has expired. Contact support to recover access.
reset.subject: Reset your {app} password

signup.email_taken: An account with this email address already exists.

banners.session_expired: Your admin session has expired. Please sign in again.
banners.mfa_enrollment_required: Two-factor authentication is required for admin access. Enrol now to continue.
banners.two_factor_enabled: Two-factor authentication is now enabled for your admin account.
banners.two_factor_disabled: Two-factor authentication is now disabled for your admin account.

descriptions.mfa_enrollment_required: Admin access requires two-factor authentication. Set it up to continue to the console.
descriptions.enable_2fa_intro: Scan the QR code with your authenticator app, or enter the manual key. Then confirm by entering the six-digit code.
descriptions.auth_bootstrap_error: We could not load your admin session. Check your connection and try again.
descriptions.recovery_codes_warning: Save these one-time codes somewhere safe. They are your only way to sign in to the admin console if you lose access to your authenticator.

errors.network: We could not reach the server. Check your connection and try again.
errors.unknown: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.missing_token: This link is missing required information.

rate_limit.exceeded: Too many requests. Please try again in {seconds} seconds.
